process.commandLine: C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe /v:on /d /c "echo [MXC] Policy expectation: allowed is read/write; readonly is read-only. & echo [MXC] Attempt READ: C:\mxc-demo-fs\allowed\input.txt & set /p ALLOWED=<C:\mxc-demo-fs\allowed\input.txt & echo [MXC] READ RESULT allowed: !ALLOWED! & echo [MXC] Attempt READ: C:\mxc-demo-fs\readonly\input.txt & set /p READONLY=<C:\mxc-demo-fs\readonly\input.txt & echo [MXC] READ RESULT readonly: !READONLY! & echo [MXC] Attempt WRITE: C:\mxc-demo-fs\readonly\write-should-fail.txt & >C:\mxc-demo-fs\readonly\write-should-fail.txt echo this should not be written && (echo [MXC] WRITE RESULT: UNEXPECTED readonly write succeeded. & exit /b 2) || (echo [MXC] WRITE RESULT: readonly write was blocked as expected. & exit /b 0)"
